'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 28''' was the twenty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 10]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Beast Wars|The Beast Wars of Onderon]]
*[[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]] and [[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Lars]]
*[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]
*[[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]]
*[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] - [[Cave of Evil/Legends|The Cave of Evil]]
*[[Senate cam droid/Legends|Senate cam droid]]
*[[12-4C-41|12-4C-41 Traffic Control Droid]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]
*[[Snowspeeder/Legends|Snowspeeder]]
